steps.title: Preserve the main verb
steps.content: The main subject is "This cadre of renowned authors," and the main verb is "helped sow." The words in the blank should introduce a modifying phrase about what the authors asserted, not create a second main clause.

steps.title: Choose a modifying phrase
steps.content: Choice A inserts a finite past-tense verb. Choice C adds the finite verb phrase "had asserted," and Choice D adds "were asserting." Each competes with "helped sow." A participial phrase after the comma correctly modifies the authors. The answer is B.
